creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to redeyetw from comment #5)
Hey,

Sorry for the delay.  I can't reproduce the error; it's actually a problem with p5-NetAddr-IP anyway, not openwebmail.

Is it still erroring?  How about 

# make -C /usr/ports/net-mgmt/p5-NetAddr-IP clean

and trying again?

Chris
